ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the program */,
  "program_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program area the program serves */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the program */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the program started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the program ends */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the program information was updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the program */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for eligibility to participate in the program */,
  "application_process" TEXT /* Steps required to apply for the program */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits provided by the program */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_area_id") REFERENCES program_areas ("program_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_areas" (
  "program_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the program area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program area */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the program area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the city is in */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county is in */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_states" (
  "program_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program-state association */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_states_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_states_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_cities" (
  "program_city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program-city association */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_cities_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_cities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_counties" (
  "program_county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program-county association */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_counties_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_counties_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_users" (
  "program_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program-user association */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user with respect to the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_users_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, program manager, end-user) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the user is in */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the user is in */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the user is in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the program */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, manage) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the program */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user providing feedback */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_feedback_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
